mapper.select: SELECT * FROM csdn_sync_config ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csdn_sync_config (csdn_user_id, category_id, enabled, last_sync_at) VALUES (#{csdnUserId}, #{categoryId}, #{enabled}, #{lastSyncAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE csdn_sync_config SET last_sync_at = #{lastSyncAt} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
